mapper.select: SELECT id, reader_id, points, level, total_borrow_count, total_return_on_time, create_time, update_time FROM reader_level
SELECT id, reader_id, points, level, total_borrow_count, total_return_on_time, create_time, update_time FROM reader_level WHERE reader_id = #{readerId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reader_level (reader_id, points, level, total_borrow_count, total_return_on_time) VALUES (#{readerId}, #{points}, #{level}, #{totalBorrowCount}, #{totalReturnOnTime})
